song.title: Trusting Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Simply trusting every day; Trusting through a stormy way; Even when my faith is small, Trusting Jesus, that is all.
[C] Chorus Trusting as the moments fly, Trusting as the days go by, Trusting Him, whate’er befall, Trusting Jesus, that is all.
[V2] 2) Brightly does His Spirit shine Into this poor heart of mine; While He leads I cannot fall, Trusting Jesus, that is all.
[V3] 3) Singing if my way be clear, Praying if the path be drear; If in danger, for Him call, Trusting Jesus, that is all.
[V4] 4) Trusting Him while life shall last, Trusting Him till earth is past, Till within the jasper wall, Trusting Jesus, that is all.
song.author: Edgar Page Stites
